title: Crispy Turkish Chicken Kebabs
description: Delicate chicken marinated in traditional Turkish spices, served atop a bed of crisp lettuce with a side of tangy tzatziki sauce.

ingredients.name: turkish spices
ingredients.notes: containing paprika, cumin, coriander, salt, and black pepper

instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, and turkish spices.
Add chicken to the marinade and mix well.
Thread chicken onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Grill kebabs for 8-10 minutes per side, or until cooked through.
Brush kebabs with olive oil during the last 2 minutes of cooking.
Serve immediately, garnished with crisp lettuce and a side of tzatziki sauce (optional).
